role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed the Latin script and Vietnamese diacritics on the sign.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color (laterite), and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the sign text and road infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like motorcycle types and tarp styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic and regulatory agents provided the definitive evidence (Vietnamese text) that immediately resolved the ambiguity of the landscape and botanics, which were shared with neighboring countries like Laos.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the red soil and steep embankment.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Noted the red sign and road width.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the underbone motorcycle and tarp shelter.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified Vietnam as the winner.
